days.title: Arrival in Prague
days.subtitle: Exploring the Old Town

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel Golden Angel
timeline.detail: Settle into your charming hotel located just a 10-minute walk from the main train station. Take a moment to refresh yourself after the journey.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Golden Angel, Prague, Czech Republic

timeline.title: Old Town Square Exploration
timeline.detail: Wander around the historic Old Town Square, marveling at the stunning architecture including the Astronomical Clock. Be sure to take photos and soak in the atmosphere.
timeline.mapQuery: Old Town Square, Prague, Czech Republic

timeline.title: Dinner at Lokál Dlouhááá
timeline.detail: Enjoy authentic Czech cuisine at this popular eatery. Don’t miss their traditional dishes like svíčková (marinated beef) and fresh draught pilsner.

timeline.title: Evening Stroll along the Vltava River
timeline.detail: Take a relaxing walk along the banks of the Vltava River. Enjoy the picturesque views of the lit-up Charles Bridge and Prague Castle.

timeline.title: Cocktails at Hemingway Bar
timeline.detail: Finish your day with a unique cocktail experience at one of Prague's most famous bars. The ambiance is perfect for unwinding after a long day of exploring.

localTips: Buy a Prague Card for free public transport and discounted attractions.
Check for local events during your stay for festivals and markets.
Download the Citymapper app for easy navigation around Prague.

days.title: Exploring Prague's Historic Sights
days.subtitle: Castle and Old Town Adventures

timeline.title: Breakfast at Café Louvre
timeline.detail: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at this historic café, famous among locals for its rich history and delicious pastries.

timeline.title: Visit Prague Castle
timeline.detail: Tour the largest ancient castle in the world and explore St. Vitus Cathedral and the royal palace. Don’t forget to check out the gardens for beautiful views.

timeline.title: Lunch at Restaurant Doma
timeline.detail: Enjoy a leisurely lunch at this cozy restaurant known for its farm-to-table concept. Try their seasonal menus that highlight local ingredients.

timeline.title: Explore Lesser Town
timeline.detail: Wander through the charming streets of the Lesser Town, visiting St. Nicholas Church and enjoying the unique architecture of the area.

timeline.title: Dinner at La Casa Argentina
timeline.detail: Savor delicious Argentine steak and specialties at this well-regarded restaurant. It offers a great selection of wines to compliment your meal.
timeline.mapQuery: La Casa Argentina, Prague, Czech Republic

timeline.title: Enjoy a Classical Concert
timeline.detail: Experience an enchanting classical concert at one of Prague’s historic concert halls. Purchase tickets in advance to ensure a seat.

localTips: Purchase castle tickets online to avoid the long queues.
Visit the gardens at Prague Castle for stunning views.
Try trdelník, a Czech pastry, from street vendors for a quick dessert.

days.title: Final Day in Prague
days.subtitle: Cultural Immersion

timeline.title: Breakfast at Mlýnská Kavárna
timeline.detail: Have breakfast at this charming riverside café, known for its coffee and homemade pastries that offer a lovely start to your final day.

timeline.title: Visit the National Museum
timeline.detail: Explore the rich history of the Czech Republic at the National Museum. This impressive building is a highlight of Prague's cultural scene, featuring diverse exhibits.

timeline.title: Lunch at Café Savoy
timeline.detail: Enjoy your last lunch at this elegantly designed café that serves classic Czech dishes and exquisite pastries in an old-world ambiance.

timeline.title: Explore Vyšehrad Castle
timeline.detail: Visit Vyšehrad, a historic fort overlooking the Vltava River. Discover the beautiful gardens and enjoy a peaceful stroll away from the city bustle.

timeline.title: Tea at Amandine
timeline.detail: Relax at Amandine, known for its delightful selection of teas and desserts. A perfect spot to unwind before your departure.

timeline.title: Depart for Airport
timeline.detail: Collect your bags from the hotel and take a taxi to Václav Havel Airport for your onward journey. Ensure you leave early amidst Prague's evening traffic.
timeline.mapQuery: Václav Havel Airport, Prague, Czech Republic

localTips: Visit the museum on Monday for fewer crowds.
Take the tram to Vyšehrad for scenic views along the route.
Always check restaurant closing times, as they can vary.

hotels.name: Hotel Golden Angel
hotels.note: Well-located hotel just a 10-minute walk from the main train station.
